Paradigm Design Systems

Empowering teams to build human-centered experiences at scale

Now Hiring: Staff UX Designer

San Francisco, CA (Remote-First) · Full-Time · $220,000 - $290,000 USD per annum

W

e are seeking an experienced Staff UX Designer to lead the design vision and technical strategy across our

core product platform. This role combines deep UX expertise with technical leadership, where you'll mentor

junior designers, establish design standards, drive accessibility compliance, and collaborate with engineering and

product leadership to define the future of collaborative design tools. You will own design decisions that impact

millions of design professionals globally.

A B O U T U S

Paradigm Design Systems is a 150-person SaaS company specializing in collaborative design infrastructure for

enterprises. We've built the industry's most intuitive platform for managing design systems, component libraries,

and cross-functional workflows. Our customers include Fortune 500 companies and leading tech startups who rely

on us to scale design operations across hundreds of designers and engineers.

Y O U R R O L E

Lead the design strategy and vision for 2-3 major product initiatives, establishing design direction and ensuring

consistency with brand and accessibility standards

Architect and evolve our design system in Figma, including component definitions, design tokens, and WCAG

2.1 AA compliance standards across all platform surfaces

Mentor and provide technical design guidance to a team of 3-4 mid-level and junior designers, including code

reviews of design specifications and design critique leadership

Conduct and synthesize advanced user research (qualitative and quantitative) using methodologies such as
contextual inquiry, usability testing, and analytics instrumentation to validate design hypotheses

Build interactive prototypes and high-fidelity wireframes in Figma and Framer to communicate complex

interaction patterns and test with users before handoff to engineering

Partner with Product and Engineering leadership to define design feasibility, technical requirements, and

implementation roadmaps for design system components

Establish and enforce accessibility standards across the platform, performing WCAG audits, semantic HTML

reviews, and accessibility testing with assistive technologies

Drive adoption of design tools and workflows (Figma, FigJam, design tokens) across the organization,

including training, documentation, and best practices

 R E Q U I R E D Q U A L I F I C AT I O N S

8+ years of professional UX design experience, with a minimum of 3 years in a senior or staff-level role with

demonstrated technical leadership

Expert proficiency in Figma, including component systems, design tokens, variables, and advanced prototyping
features

Deep expertise in design systems, accessibility standards (WCAG 2.1), and semantic design patterns for

complex enterprise applications

Proven track record leading user research initiatives, conducting usability testing, and translating findings into

actionable design improvements

Demonstrated ability to mentor designers, provide constructive technical feedback, and influence design

culture across teams

Strong understanding of modern web technologies (HTML, CSS, responsive design principles) and ability to

communicate design specifications to engineers

D E S I R E D Q U A L I F I C AT I O N S

Experience designing and shipping SaaS products, design tools, or design infrastructure platforms

Proficiency with Framer or other advanced prototyping tools for motion and interaction design

Experience with design tokens libraries, design-to-code workflows, and Storybook or similar component

documentation systems

Knowledge of assistive technologies (screen readers, voice control) and hands-on accessibility testing

experience

Published design case studies or speaking experience at design conferences demonstrating thought leadership

T O O L S  O F  T H E T R A D E

Figma, FigJam, Framer, Design tokens, Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA), User research methodologies, Prototyping

and interaction design, Design systems architecture, HTML/CSS fundamentals, Analytics and data visualization

W E O F F E R

Competitive salary ($220K-$290K) commensurate with experience, plus annual bonus (15-20% target)

Comprehensive healthcare coverage including medical, dental, and vision for employee and family

Unlimited PTO policy plus 10 company-observed holidays

Generous professional development budget ($3K annually) for conferences, courses, and tools

Home office stipend ($2K annually) and fully remote-first culture with optional SF office access

Stock options package with 4-year vest and 1-year cliff for eligible roles

Parental leave (6 months paid for all parents) and fertility/adoption support

 Wellness program including gym membership stipend, mental health support, and quarterly wellness events

T O A P P LY

To apply, please visit careers.paradigm-design.com and submit your application including: resume, portfolio link

(Figma or personal site showcasing design system work and UX process), and a cover letter explaining your
interest in design systems and technical leadership. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. We strongly

encourage candidates from underrepresented backgrounds in design to apply.
